category_sources: source_facts.description: Sends magic packets to wake up network-devices.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name: wakeonlan; source_facts.homepage official repository path is jpoliv/wakeonlan.
docs_sources: source_facts.repo points to the official GitHub repository; repository README is the official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/jpoliv/wakeonlan; per instruction, repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Wake-on-LAN magic packets for network devices; source_facts.executables lists wakeonlan CLI.
